title: bidens grandiflora var. serrulata
intro: Bidens grandiflora var. serrulata, also known as the Serrulate Bidens or Yellowhead, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae), characterized by its bright yellow flowers and serrated leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, terpenoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Bidens grandiflora var. serrulata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or using a solvent like ethanol to extract the active compounds.
